mapper.select: SELECT /* RateMapper.selectRateResChgTrgCntByMod */ COUNT(*) FROM NMCP_RATE_RES_CHG_TRG WHERE RES_CHG_APY_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '01' AND PROC_YN = 'N' AND MOD(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(RES_CHG_TRG_SEQ, -6)), 4) = #{batchMod}

SELECT /* RateMapper.selectRateResChgTrgListByMod */ RES_CHG_TRG_SEQ , RES_CHG_BAS_SEQ , RES_CHG_APY_DATE , PROC_YN , EVNT_TRTM_NO , EVNT_TRTM_DT , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM FROM NMCP_RATE_RES_CHG_TRG WHERE RES_CHG_APY_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '01' AND PROC_YN = 'N' AND MOD(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(RES_CHG_TRG_SEQ, -6)), 4) = #{batchMod} ORDER BY RES_CHG_TRG_SEQ ASC
SELECT /* RateMapper.selectRateResChgCntNotProcess */ COUNT(*) FROM NMCP_RATE_RES_CHG_BAS WHERE RES_CHG_APY_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '01' AND NVL(BATCH_RSLT_CD, '-1') IN ('-1', '99999')

SELECT /* RateMapper.selectRateResChgListNotProcess */ RATE_RES_CHG_SEQ , SVC_CNTR_NO , MOBILE_NO , USER_ID , EVENT_CODE , RES_CHG_RATE_CD , BEF_CHG_RATE_CD , BEF_CHG_RATE_AMNT , PARAM , RES_CHG_DATE , RES_CHG_APY_DATE , TRT_MDL_DIV , GLOBAL_NO , BATCH_RSLT_CD , CRET_IP , CRET_DT FROM NMCP_RATE_RES_CHG_BAS WHERE RES_CHG_APY_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '01' AND NVL(BATCH_RSLT_CD, '-1') IN ('-1', '99999') ORDER BY RATE_RES_CHG_SEQ ASC

SELECT /* RateMapper.selectRateResChgCntFailCancel */ COUNT(*) FROM NMCP_RATE_RES_CHG_BAS WHERE RATE_RES_CHG_SEQ IN ( SELECT SUBSTR(PRCS_MDL_IND, 4) FROM ( SELECT PRCS_MDL_IND , RSLT_CD , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY PRCS_MDL_IND ORDER BY SYS_RDATE DESC) RNUM FROM MCP_SERVICE_ALTER_TRACE WHERE NCN IN ( SELECT SVC_CNTR_NO FROM NMCP_RATE_RES_CHG_BAS WHERE RES_CHG_APY_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '01' AND BATCH_RSLT_CD = '00000' ) AND SYS_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '01' AND EVENT_CODE = 'X38' AND PRCS_MDL_IND LIKE 'BA_%' ) WHERE RNUM = 1 AND RSLT_CD IN ('ITL_SYS_E0001', '9998', '9999') ) ORDER BY RATE_RES_CHG_SEQ ASC

SELECT /* RateMapper.selectRateResChgListFailCancel */ RATE_RES_CHG_SEQ , SVC_CNTR_NO , MOBILE_NO , USER_ID , EVENT_CODE , RES_CHG_RATE_CD , BEF_CHG_RATE_CD , BEF_CHG_RATE_AMNT , PARAM , RES_CHG_DATE , RES_CHG_APY_DATE , TRT_MDL_DIV , GLOBAL_NO , BATCH_RSLT_CD , CRET_IP , CRET_DT FROM NMCP_RATE_RES_CHG_BAS WHERE RATE_RES_CHG_SEQ IN ( SELECT SUBSTR(PRCS_MDL_IND, 4) FROM ( SELECT PRCS_MDL_IND , RSLT_CD , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY PRCS_MDL_IND ORDER BY SYS_RDATE DESC) RNUM FROM MCP_SERVICE_ALTER_TRACE WHERE NCN IN ( SELECT SVC_CNTR_NO FROM NMCP_RATE_RES_CHG_BAS WHERE RES_CHG_APY_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '01' AND BATCH_RSLT_CD = '00000' ) AND SYS_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '01' AND EVENT_CODE = 'X38' AND PRCS_MDL_IND LIKE 'BA_%' ) WHERE RNUM = 1 AND RSLT_CD IN ('ITL_SYS_E0001', '9998', '9999') ) ORDER BY RATE_RES_CHG_SEQ ASC

SELECT /* RateMapper.selectRateResChgListFailSubscribe */ COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT PRCS_MDL_IND , RSLT_CD , T_SOC_CODE , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY PRCS_MDL_IND, T_SOC_CODE ORDER BY SYS_RDATE DESC) RNUM FROM MCP_SERVICE_ALTER_TRACE WHERE NCN IN ( SELECT SVC_CNTR_NO FROM NMCP_RATE_RES_CHG_BAS WHERE RES_CHG_APY_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '01' AND BATCH_RSLT_CD = '00000' ) AND SYS_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '01' AND EVENT_CODE = 'X21' AND PRCS_MDL_IND LIKE 'BA_%' ) WHERE RNUM = 1 AND RSLT_CD IN ('ITL_SYS_E0001', 'ITL_999_COMS9999', 'ITL_999_FWCS0005', 'MCG_BIZ_E0421', '9998', '9999')

SELECT /* RateMapper.selectRateResChgListFailSubscribe */ PRCS_MDL_IND , T_SOC_CODE FROM ( SELECT PRCS_MDL_IND , RSLT_CD , T_SOC_CODE , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY PRCS_MDL_IND, T_SOC_CODE ORDER BY SYS_RDATE DESC) RNUM FROM MCP_SERVICE_ALTER_TRACE WHERE NCN IN ( SELECT SVC_CNTR_NO FROM NMCP_RATE_RES_CHG_BAS WHERE RES_CHG_APY_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '01' AND BATCH_RSLT_CD = '00000' ) AND SYS_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '01' AND EVENT_CODE = 'X21' AND PRCS_MDL_IND LIKE 'BA_%' ) WHERE RNUM = 1 AND RSLT_CD IN ('ITL_SYS_E0001', 'ITL_999_COMS9999', 'ITL_999_FWCS0005', 'MCG_BIZ_E0421', '9998', '9999')

SELECT /* RateMapper.selectRateResChgBas */ RATE_RES_CHG_SEQ , SVC_CNTR_NO , MOBILE_NO , USER_ID , EVENT_CODE , RES_CHG_RATE_CD , BEF_CHG_RATE_CD , BEF_CHG_RATE_AMNT , PARAM , RES_CHG_DATE , RES_CHG_APY_DATE , TRT_MDL_DIV , GLOBAL_NO , BATCH_RSLT_CD , CRET_IP , CRET_DT FROM NMCP_RATE_RES_CHG_BAS WHERE RATE_RES_CHG_SEQ = #{rateResChgSeq}
SELECT /* RateMapper.selectAddSvcInfo */ ADDITION_NAME AS SOC_NM , RANTAL AS SOC_PRICE , SOC AS SOC_CODE FROM MCP_ADDITION WHERE SOC = #{socCode}
mapper.update: UPDATE /* RateMapper.updateRateResChgTrgComplete */ NMCP_RATE_RES_CHG_TRG SET PROC_YN = 'Y' WHERE RES_CHG_TRG_SEQ = #{resChgTrgSeq}
